texto: I am so confused, nobody wants to be in a sate of confusion, but me when I get confused its like the best moments. My brain works in differences ways. Each way somebody inside of my head wakes up. Confusion is the voices inside of my head; each voice is different from each other. Just because I became confused all of them woke up like death wakes up from darkness.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jameel Abuayyd: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I am so confused, nobody wants to be in a sate of confusion, but me when I get confused its like …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, brain, confused pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e dia-chuvoso.
